== Notes for [[Item:Q103275|Q103275]] ==

Licentiate Pedro José de Maluenda y Romero Ha-Levi was also a “Judge of the Arcades” in the city of Seville, Spain*. He was also connected to Jewish Sephardic people** through his mother, Ana Salamina Romero Ha-Levi ***

Bibliography

*
https://www.ancestry.com.au/genealogy/records/pedro-jose-de-maluenda-romero-ha-levi-licenciado-juez-de-las-arcadas-de-seville-chief-of-appeals-judge-24-29wf3kt

**
https://www.ancestry.com.au/genealogy/records/pedro-jose-de-maluenda-romero-ha-levi-licenciado-juez-de-las-arcadas-de-seville-chief-of-appeals-judge-24-29wf3kt

***
https://diariojudio.com/opinion/the-jewish-converso-lineage-of-don-juan-de-onate-ha-levi-family/5724/

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000000401585942

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
